item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly brakes the repeated pattern of adding downstream manual checks, names the recurring pattern across reagent, instrument, waste, and cold storage cases, and rejects making another confirmer the default. It permits only a one-day emergency workaround while moving upstream to process entry, responsibility ownership, system records, reminders, scanning, and structural closure. This satisfies the anti-spiral expectation and avoids the fail signal of simply adding another manual gate."}
